description: Use the N/task module to create tasks and place them in the internal NetSuite scheduling or task queue. You can use this module to submit scheduled scripts, run map/reduce scripts, import CSV files, merge duplicate records, and execute asynchronous searches, document capture tasks, constructed queries, SuiteQL queries, and workflows.

methods.name: checkStatus
methods.description: Returns a task status object associated with a specific task ID.

params.name: options.taskId
params.description: The ID of the task to check the status of.

methods.returns: task.CsvImportTaskStatus | task.EntityDeduplicationTaskStatus | task.MapReduceScriptTaskStatus | task.QueryTaskStatus | task.RecordActionTaskStatus | task.ScheduledScriptTaskStatus | task.SearchTaskStatus | task.SuiteQLTaskStatus | task.WorkflowTriggerTaskStatus

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates an object for a specific task type and returns the task object.

params.name: options.taskType
params.description: The type of task to create. Use task.TaskType enum values.

methods.returns: task.CsvImportTask | task.EntityDeduplicationTask | task.MapReduceScriptTask | task.QueryTask | task.RecordActionTask | task.ScheduledScriptTask | task.SearchTask | task.SuiteQLTask | task.WorkflowTriggerTask

enums.name: ActionCondition
enums.description: Holds the string values for the possible record action conditions.

enums.name: DedupeEntityType
enums.description: Holds the string values for entity types for which you can merge duplicate records with task.EntityDeduplicationTask.

enums.name: DedupeMode
enums.description: Holds the string values for available deduplication modes when merging duplicate records with task.EntityDeduplicationTask.

enums.name: MapReduceStage
enums.description: Holds the string values for possible stages in a map/reduce script deployment.

enums.name: MasterSelectionMode
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported master selection modes when merging duplicate records with task.EntityDeduplicationTask.

members.name: CREATED_EARLIEST
members.description: Select the record created earliest as master

members.name: MOST_RECENT_ACTIVITY
members.description: Select the record with the most recent activity as master

members.name: MOST_POPULATED_FIELDS
members.description: Select the record with the most populated fields as master

enums.name: TaskStatus
enums.description: Holds the string values for the possible status of tasks created and submitted with the N/task module.

enums.name: TaskType
enums.description: Holds the string values for the types of task objects you can create using task.create(options).

objectTypes.name: CsvImportTask
objectTypes.description: The properties of a CSV import task. Use the methods and properties for this object to submit a CSV import task into the task queue and asynchronously import record data into NetSuite.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Directs NetSuite to place a CSV import task into the NetSuite task queue and returns a unique ID for the task.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: importFile
properties.description: CSV file to import. Use a file.File object or a string that represents the CSV text to be imported.

properties.name: linkedFiles
properties.description: A map of key-value pairs that sets the data to be imported in a linked file for a multi-file import job.

properties.name: mappingId
properties.description: Script ID or internal ID of the saved import map that you created when you ran the Import Assistant.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name for the CSV import task.

properties.name: queueId
properties.description: Overrides the Queue Number property under Advanced Options on the Import Options page of the Import Assistant.

objectTypes.name: CsvImportTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a CSV import task placed into the NetSuite scheduling queue.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status for a CSV import task. Returns a task.TaskStatus enum value.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: The task ID associated with the specified task.

objectTypes.name: DocumentCaptureTask
objectTypes.description: The properties of a document capture task. Use the methods and properties of this object to submit a document capture task into the NetSuite task queue.

methods.name: addInboundDependency
methods.description: Adds a scheduled script task to the document capture task as a dependent task.

params.name: options.scriptId
params.description: The script ID of the dependent script.

params.name: options.deploymentId
params.description: The deployment ID of the dependent script.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits the document capture task for asynchronous processing and returns the task ID.

properties.name: documentType
properties.description: The document type.

properties.name: features
properties.description: The features to extract from the document (such as fields, tables, or text).

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: inboundDependencies
properties.description: Key-value pairs that contain information about the dependent tasks added to the document capture task.

properties.name: inputFile
properties.description: The document to extract content from.

properties.name: language
properties.description: The language of the document.

properties.name: outputFilePath
properties.description: The path of the JSON file to export document capture results to.

properties.name: ociConfig
properties.description: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) credentials when using unlimited usage mode.

objectTypes.name: DocumentCaptureTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a document capture task placed into the NetSuite task queue.

properties.name: status
properties.description: The status for a document capture task. Returns a task.TaskStatus enum value.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: The task ID associated with the specified task.

objectTypes.name: EntityDeduplicationTask
objectTypes.description: All the properties of a merge duplicate records task request. Use the methods and properties of this object to submit a merge duplicate record job task into the NetSuite task queue.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Directs NetSuite to place the merge duplicate records task into the NetSuite task queue and returns a unique ID for the task.

properties.name: dedupeMode
properties.description: The mode in which to merge or delete duplicate records. Use values from the task.DedupeMode enum.

properties.name: entityType
properties.description: The type of entity on which you want to merge duplicate records. Use a task.DedupeEntityType enum to set the value.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: masterRecordId
properties.description: Master record ID.

properties.name: masterSelectionMode
properties.description: Master selection mode. Use values from the task.MasterSelectionMode enum.

properties.name: recordIds
properties.description: Number array of record internal IDs to perform the merge or delete operation on.

objectTypes.name: EntityDeduplicationTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a merge duplicate record task placed into the NetSuite task queue.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status for a merge duplicate record task. Returns a task.TaskStatus enum value.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: The task ID associated with the specified task.

objectTypes.name: MapReduceScriptTask
objectTypes.description: A map/reduce script deployment.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits a map/reduce script deployment for processing.

properties.name: deploymentId
properties.description: Script ID (as a string), for the script deployment record for a map/reduce script.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: params
properties.description: Object that represents key-value pairs that override static script parameter field values on the script deployment record.

properties.name: scriptId
properties.description: Internal ID (as a number), or script ID (as a string), for the map/reduce script record.

objectTypes.name: MapReduceScriptTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a map/reduce script deployment that has been submitted for processing.

methods.name: getCurrentTotalSize
methods.description: Returns the total size in bytes of all stored work in progress.

methods.name: getPendingMapCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of records or rows not yet processed by the map stage.

methods.name: getPendingMapSize
methods.description: Returns the total number of bytes not yet processed by the map stage, as a component of total size.

methods.name: getPendingOutputCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of records or rows not yet processed.

methods.name: getPendingOutputSize
methods.description: Returns the total size in bytes of all key-value pairs written as output, as a component of total size.

methods.name: getPendingReduceCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of records or rows not yet processed by the reduce stage.

methods.name: getPendingReduceSize
methods.description: Returns the total number of bytes not yet processed by the reduce stage, as a component of total size.

methods.name: getPercentageCompleted
methods.description: Returns the current percentage complete for the current stage.

methods.name: getTotalMapCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of records or rows passed as input to the map stage.

methods.name: getTotalOutputCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of records or rows passed as inputs to the output phase.

methods.name: getTotalReduceCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of record or row inputs to the reduce stage.

properties.name: deploymentId
properties.description: Script ID for a script deployment record.

properties.name: scriptId
properties.description: Internal ID for a map/reduce script record.

properties.name: stage
properties.description: The current stage of a map/reduce script deployment. See task.MapReduceStage for supported values.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status for a map/reduce script task. Returns a task.TaskStatus enum value.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: The task ID associated with the specified task.

objectTypes.name: QueryTask
objectTypes.description: The properties of a query task. Use the methods and properties of this object to submit a query task into the NetSuite task queue.

methods.name: addInboundDependency
methods.description: Adds a scheduled script task or map/reduce script task to the query task as a dependent task.

params.name: options.scriptId
params.description: The script ID of the dependent script.

params.name: options.deploymentId
params.description: The deployment ID of the dependent script.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits the query task for asynchronous processing and returns the task ID.

properties.name: fileId
properties.description: Internal ID of the CSV file to export query results to. Mutually exclusive with filePath.

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: Path of the CSV file to export query results to. Mutually exclusive with fileId.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: inboundDependencies
properties.description: Key-value pairs that contain information about the dependent tasks added to the query task.

properties.name: query
properties.description: Query definition for the query task.

objectTypes.name: QueryTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a query task placed into the NetSuite task queue.

properties.name: fileId
properties.description: Internal ID of the CSV file that query results are exported to.

properties.name: query
properties.description: Query definition for the submitted query task.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status of the submitted query task.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: ID of the submitted query task.

objectTypes.name: RecordActionTask
objectTypes.description: The properties of a record action task. Use this object to place a record action task into the NetSuite scheduling queue.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits a record action task for processing and returns its task ID.

properties.name: action
properties.description: The ID of the action to be invoked.

properties.name: condition
properties.description: The condition used to select record IDs of records for which the action is to be executed.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: paramCallback
properties.description: Function that takes record ID and returns the parameter object for the specified record ID.

properties.name: params
properties.description: An array of parameter objects. Each object corresponds to one record ID of the record for which the action is to be executed.

properties.name: recordType
properties.description: The record type on which the action is to be performed.

objectTypes.name: RecordActionTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a record action task in the NetSuite scheduling queue.

properties.name: complete
properties.description: The number of record action tasks with a completed status.

properties.name: errors
properties.description: The error details of failed action executions.

properties.name: failed
properties.description: The number of record action tasks with a failed status.

properties.name: pending
properties.description: The number of record action tasks with a pending status.

properties.name: results
properties.description: The results of successfully executed record action tasks.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Represents the record action task status. Returns a value from the task.TaskStatus enum.

properties.name: succeeded
properties.description: The number of record action tasks with a succeeded status.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: The task ID associated with the specified task.

objectTypes.name: ScheduledScriptTask
objectTypes.description: All the properties of a scheduled script task. Use this object to place a scheduled script deployment into the NetSuite scheduling queue.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Directs NetSuite to place a scheduled script deployment into the NetSuite scheduling queue and returns a unique ID for the task.

properties.name: deploymentId
properties.description: Script ID (as a string), for the script deployment record.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: params
properties.description: Object with key-value pairs that override the static script parameter field values on the script deployment.

properties.name: scriptId
properties.description: Internal ID (as a number), or script ID (as a string) for the script record.

objectTypes.name: ScheduledScriptTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a scheduled script placed into the NetSuite scheduling queue.

properties.name: deploymentId
properties.description: Script ID for a script deployment record.

properties.name: scriptId
properties.description: Internal ID for a script record.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status for a scheduled script task. Returns a task.TaskStatus enum value.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: The task ID associated with the specified task.

objectTypes.name: SearchTask
objectTypes.description: The properties required to initiate an asynchronous search.

methods.name: addInboundDependency
methods.description: Adds a scheduled script task or map/reduce script task to the search task as a dependent script.

params.name: options.scriptId
params.description: The script ID of the dependent script.

params.name: options.deploymentId
params.description: The deployment ID of the dependent script.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Places the asynchronous search initiation task into the SuiteScript task queue, and returns a unique ID for the task.

properties.name: fileId
properties.description: ID of the CSV file to export search results into.

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: Path of the CSV file to export search results into.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: inboundDependencies
properties.description: Key-value pairs to describe the dependent scripts added to the search task.

properties.name: savedSearchId
properties.description: ID of the saved search to be executed during the task.

objectTypes.name: SearchTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of an asynchronous search initiation task that is placed into the NetSuite task queue.

properties.name: fileId
properties.description: ID of the CSV file into which search results are exported.

properties.name: savedSearchId
properties.description: ID of the saved search executed during the task.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status of an asynchronous search task. Returns one of the task.TaskStatus enum values.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: ID of the asynchronous task.

objectTypes.name: SuiteQLTask
objectTypes.description: The properties of a SuiteQL task. Use the methods and properties of this object to submit a SuiteQL query task into the NetSuite task queue.

methods.name: addInboundDependency
methods.description: Adds a scheduled script task or map/reduce script task to the SuiteQL task as a dependent task.

params.name: options.scriptId
params.description: The script ID of the dependent script.

params.name: options.deploymentId
params.description: The deployment ID of the dependent script.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits the SuiteQL task for asynchronous processing and returns the task ID.

properties.name: fileId
properties.description: Internal ID of the CSV file to export SuiteQL query results to. Mutually exclusive with filePath.

properties.name: filePath
properties.description: Path of the CSV file to export SuiteQL query results to. Mutually exclusive with fileId.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: inboundDependencies
properties.description: Key-value pairs that contain information about the dependent tasks added to the SuiteQL task.

properties.name: params
properties.description: Parameters for the SuiteQL query.

properties.name: query
properties.description: SuiteQL query definition for the SuiteQL task.

objectTypes.name: SuiteQLTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of a SuiteQL task placed into the NetSuite task queue.

properties.name: fileId
properties.description: Internal ID of the CSV file that SuiteQL query results are exported to.

properties.name: params
properties.description: Parameters for the SuiteQL query.

properties.name: query
properties.description: SuiteQL query definition for the SuiteQL task.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status of the SuiteQL task.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: ID of the submitted SuiteQL task.

objectTypes.name: WorkflowTriggerTask
objectTypes.description: All the properties required to asynchronously initiate a workflow. Use WorkflowTriggerTask to create a task that initiates an instance of a specific workflow.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Directs NetSuite to place the asynchronous workflow initiation task into the NetSuite scheduling queue and returns a unique ID for the task.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The ID of the task.

properties.name: params
properties.description: Object that contains key-value pairs to set default values on fields specific to the workflow.

properties.name: recordId
properties.description: Internal ID of the workflow definition base record.

properties.name: recordType
properties.description: Record type of the workflow base record.

properties.name: workflowId
properties.description: Internal ID (as a number), or script ID (as a string), for the workflow definition.

objectTypes.name: WorkflowTriggerTaskStatus
objectTypes.description: The status of an asynchronous workflow initiation task placed into the NetSuite task queue.

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status for an asynchronous workflow placed in the NetSuite task queue. Returns a value from the task.TaskStatus enum.

properties.name: taskId
properties.description: The task ID associated with the specified task.
